The Vault v0.6.1 is a hotfix for v0.6.0.

Fixes:
- Blank window on startup: v0.6.0 could open to an empty window because the desktop renderer imported a helper from the core package entry point, which transitively pulls in Node-only modules (better-sqlite3, drizzle, node:fs) that cannot load in the browser renderer — so React never mounted. The provider-role resolution helper now lives in a browser-safe `@the-vault/core/provider-resolution` module with no database or Node imports, and the renderer imports it from there.

No functional changes otherwise. Everything introduced in v0.6.0 — Work/Brain project types, the Open-Loops v2 shadow lifecycle, the truthful AI runtime cockpit, and provider failover observability — is unchanged and now renders correctly.

Users on v0.6.0 should install v0.6.1. This build packages the desktop app and the bundled `vault-memory` MCP sidecar runtime. After installing, open The Vault and use Settings -> Client setup to connect Codex, Claude Desktop, or Claude Code.
